function.name: git
function.description: Run a git command in the workspace. Supports: status, diff, log, init, add, commit, show, restore. All operations are local-only (no push/pull). Use 'diff' to see unstaged changes, 'status' to see file states, 'log' for recent commits, 'init' to initialize a repo, 'add' to stage files, 'commit' to commit staged changes, 'show' to read a committed version of a file, 'restore' to recover a file from the last commit.

subcommand.description: Git subcommand: status, diff, log, init, add, or commit

args.description: Optional arguments: file paths for 'add', commit message for 'commit', etc.
